preReview.title: Charlotte v Montreal: Smith sets his sights on top-four finish
preReview.description: Charlotte will be looking to continue their impressive run at Bank of America Stadium when they take on Montreal this weekend.

preReview.title: Charlotte v Montreal: Smith apunta a un puesto entre los cuatro primeros
preReview.description: Charlotte buscará continuar con su impresionante racha en el Bank of America Stadium cuando enfrenten a Montreal este fin de semana.

preReview.title: Charlotte - Montreal: Smith punta al quarto posto
preReview.description: Charlotte cercherà di continuare il suo impressionante cammino al Bank of America Stadium quando sfiderà Montreal questo weekend.

preReview.title: Charlotte x Montreal: Smith mira terminar entre os quatro primeiros
preReview.description: Charlotte estará procurando continuar sua impressionante sequência no Bank of America Stadium quando enfrentar o Montreal neste fim de semana.

preReview.title: Charlotte v Montréal : Smith vise une place parmi les quatre premiers
preReview.description: Charlotte cherchera à poursuivre sa belle série au Bank of America Stadium en affrontant Montréal ce week-end.

preReview.title: Charlotte gegen Montreal: Smith peilt Top-Vier-Platzierung an
preReview.description: Charlotte wird darauf aus sein, ihre beeindruckende Serie im Bank of America Stadium fortzusetzen, wenn sie an diesem Wochenende auf Montreal treffen.

preReview.title: شارلوت ضد مونتريال: سميث يضع نصب عينيه إنهاء الموسم في المراكز الأربعة الأولى

preReview.title: Charlotte x Montreal: Smith mira um lugar no top 4
